name: github_add_repo_access_to_self_hosted_runner_group_in_org
description: Add a repository to the list of repositories that can access a self-hosted runner group in an organization (PUT /orgs/{org}/actions/runner-groups/{runner_group_id}/repositories/{repository_id}). Runner group visibility must be selected. Classic tokens need admin:org scope. Success is HTTP 204. See GitHub REST self-hosted runner groups.
